prompt: Pause the strategy, preserve the record, alert legal and compliance, and prepare a self-report path instead of continuing the trading play.
summary: Portland Desk acknowledges Tim's notice, immediately pauses the trading strategy, preserves all records under litigation hold, notifies Legal and Compliance, and begins compiling a self-report packet for counsel review instead of continuing the trading play.

messages.subject: Re: IMPORTANT - READ IMMEDIATELY — Pausing activity and notifying Legal/Compliance
messages.body_text:
Tim,

Acknowledged. We will immediately pause the trading strategy and halt any related orders. We will preserve all e-mails, databases, word-processing files, spreadsheets, calendars and any other electronic data — no deletions. We will take system snapshots and secure copies to maintain chain-of-custody. We are alerting Legal and Compliance now and will begin assembling a self-report packet (timeline, affected transactions, document and custodian list) for counsel review. We will await counsel's instructions before any further action.

— Portland Desk
messages.rationale: Implements the intervention to stop trading activity, preserve the record, and escalate to Legal/Compliance while initiating a self-report rather than continuing the trading play.

messages.subject: Re: IMPORTANT - READ IMMEDIATELY — Legal/Compliance acknowledged
messages.body_text:
Tim,

Legal and Compliance have been notified and have acknowledged receipt. They instructed us to preserve all materials and to forward the self-report packet to internal counsel for review. We are compiling the timeline and supporting documents now and will send the draft to Legal before any external contact. We remain paused.

— Portland Desk
messages.rationale: Records confirmation that Legal/Compliance have been notified and establishes counsel-reviewed self-report workflow; documents the change of course on the thread.

top_subjects: Re: IMPORTANT - READ IMMEDIATELY — Legal/Compliance acknowledged
Re: IMPORTANT - READ IMMEDIATELY — Pausing activity and notifying Legal/Compliance
notes: Recipient scope was clamped to internal Enron participants.
